title: Qualitative comparative analysis (QCA) method as a tool for scaling Regenerative Urban Food Systems - tools templates
author: Kopczynska, Ewa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Two tables are supplementary to the QCA methodological protocol developed within the SURFIT project.  
  Table 1  is usefull in mapping the processes in question and analyse them in detail by noting out potential causes. Later on it helps in creating conditions/variables for the next step. 
  Table 2  is desing to facilitate grading process of previously defined cases with regard to each of the variables. This table can be a base for actual truth table. 
 They can be reused as a tool for different analysis using this method, for either replicational or brand new research.
